steps.title: Find Prieto's film
steps.content: The student needs an example of a film Mateo Prieto worked on. The notes say Frida was directed by Julia Taymor and that Prieto was the film's cinematographer.

steps.title: Name the specific example
steps.content: The matching option names Frida as an example of Prieto's cinematography work. Choice A omits the film title, Choice C describes filmmaking generally, and Choice D describes the cinematographer's role without giving a film example. The answer is B.
